cases.prompt: Create a queued job to process an order with retries, exponential backoff, and a failure handler.
cases.expect: references jobs-and-dispatching.md + retries-and-failure.md: ShouldQueue, $tries, $backoff array, failed(Throwable)

cases.prompt: How do I dispatch a batch of jobs and run something when they all finish, plus chain a few ordered jobs?
cases.expect: references batches-chains-events.md: Bus::batch with then/finally, and Bus::chain([...])

cases.prompt: My queued job keeps retrying forever and workers serve stale code after deploys — how do I fix both?
cases.expect: references retries-and-failure.md: set $tries/$backoff, run php artisan queue:restart after deploy
